nasb.text: He went up from there to Penuel and spoke similarly to them; and the men of Penuel answered him just as the men of Succoth had answered.

esv.text: And from there he went up to Penuel, and spoke to them in the same way, and the men of Penuel answered him as the men of Succoth had answered.

cnv.text: 基甸從那裡上到毘努伊勒，也向他們說了同樣的話；毘努伊勒人回答他也像疏割人回答的一樣。

ccb.text: 基甸又去毗努伊勒提出同样的请求，也遭到拒绝。
